Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a classification for properties, helping to organize and filter them (e.g., Residential, Commercial).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

name.description: The name of the property category (e.g., 'Residential', 'Commercial', 'Land').

description.description: A brief explanation or context for this property category.

Property.title: Property
Property.description: Manages details for both finished and under-construction properties, including core information and specific attributes based on its lifecycle stage.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Property entity.

name.description: The common name given to the property.

code.description: A unique identifier code for the property, distinct from its primary key.

location.description: The physical location or address of the property.

size.description: The total size of the property, typically in square meters or square feet.

description.description: A detailed description providing more information about the property.

type.description: Indicates the current stage of the property (e.g., 'Finished', 'Under Construction').

createdAt.description: The date and time when the property record was created.

isDeleted.description: A flag indicating if the property record has been soft-deleted (true) or is active (false).

status.description: The occupancy status for finished properties (e.g., 'Occupied', 'Vacant').

monthlyRent.description: The expected monthly rental income for finished properties.

paymentDueDay.description: The day of the month (1-31) when rent payments are typically due for finished properties.

tenantName.description: The name of the current tenant, if the finished property is occupied.

tenantContact.description: Contact information for the current tenant.

totalInvestment.description: The total investment cost for the property.

constructionStage.description: The current stage of construction for under-construction properties.

estimatedBudget.description: An optional estimated budget for under-construction properties.

members.description: A map of user IDs to roles (admin, manager, viewer) for authorization.

definition.description: Collection for finished properties. Access is controlled by the denormalized 'members' map.

params.name: propertyId
params.description: The unique ID of the property.

params.name: propertyId
params.description: The unique ID of the property.
